images.alt: A vibrant, ultra-realistic candid fashion-fantasy photograph of a pretty party girl riding a majestic white stallion unicorn galloping fast along a sunlit beach in bright daytime natural light. Landscape orientation. The camera is slightly zoomed out to reveal more of the unicorn’s full body in motion, with sand flying up beneath its hooves and ocean waves crashing nearby. The rider throws both arms high overhead with hands open and palms facing out in an ecstatic “woo-hoo” expression of freedom and exhilaration, her hair blowing wildly in the sea breeze. She wears a bold rainbow-themed outfit inspired by early 1980s Madonna styling: layered textures, playful accessories, retro glam attitude, colorful expressive fashion, energetic and iconic. The unicorn looks powerful, elegant, and graceful, with a flowing mane, muscular motion, and a subtle iridescent sheen. Cinematic depth of field, sharp focus on the rider and unicorn, soft bokeh background, high-fashion fantasy candid photography, ultra-detailed, Nikon D850, 85mm lens look, vivid colors, natural sunlight, dynamic action, no text, no logos.

record.text: Experts fear that fake images of leopards casually walking through create a false impression that these leopards are bold and comfortable around people. In reality, they prefer to avoid people, and their numbers in the Cape are quite low.

Last week, images of a leopard walking through a South African town were widely distributed on social media, but were later confirmed to be AI-generated.
